title: Wathe:GO
description: Adds more supporter skins to Wathe
body:
A small mod that simply adds more knife skins to doctor4t's Wathe mod.

These skins are only available for doctor4t supporters.

Most textures are made by Astratene, Sweet tooth is made by TheEnderCore, and credit to semberscythe for the roze colour pallette and vibes.
